    A

    ACTIVE - Enum constant in enum class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.BookingStatus
     
    addBooking(Booking) - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Customer
    Adds a booking to this customer's booking list.
    AddBooking - Class in bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.commands
    Usage: addbooking [customerId] [outboundFlightId] - One-way booking addbooking [customerId] [outboundFlightId] [returnFlightId] - Round-trip booking
    AddBooking(int, int) - Constructor for class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.commands.AddBooking
    Constructor for one-way booking (backward compatible)
    AddBooking(int, int, Integer) - Constructor for class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.commands.AddBooking
    Constructor for round-trip booking
    addBookingFromData(Booking) - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.FlightBookingSystem
    Performs the addBookingFromData operation.
    addCustomer(Customer) - Method in class bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.FlightBookingSystem
    Performs the addCustomer operation.

    Represents a AddCustomer in the flight booking system.

    Represents an authenticated user account in the flight booking system.
